cause_analysis.narrative: Fabi hair studio churned on 2026-04-26 after 60 days with Zoca. 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [SLA] 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.

[SLA example] On 2026-03-25 via phone_call, client wrote: "Hello. Hi, Chief Fabiola. Hi, Chief Fabiola. Hi. I'm back from my vacation. Perfect, Fabiola. Do you mind if I give you …" — no outbound response in 19 days.
